generated_oml:
import "http://example.org/DTDFVocab" as DTDFVocab

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of the gantry crane"
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab environment for the gantry crane"
    base:contains CraneFrame, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, TMC4671EvalMotorController, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartPositionSensor, HoistPositionSensor, ArduinoController
]

instance GantryCrane : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane inspired by harbor cranes in Antwerp, moving small pucks representing containers between locations"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment GantryCraneSystem
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures cart position and speed via motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist position and speed via motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CartPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartPositionSensor
]

instance HoistPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistPositionSensor
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time swing angle measurements from encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerContainerization, GantrylibPythonModule
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time wind speed measurements from anemometer"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerContainerization
]

instance CartPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time cart position and speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerContainerization, GantrylibPythonModule
]

instance HoistPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time hoist position and speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerContainerization, GantrylibPythonModule
]

instance TimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of crane state stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartPositionDataTransmitted, HoistPositionDataTransmitted, SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBStorage, DockerContainerization
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls cart movement via TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls hoist movement via TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance TMC4671EvalMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor controller for precise stepper motor control"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Picks up containers using electromagnetic force"
]

instance ArduinoController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Executes actuation commands for motors and electromagnet"
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization of digital twin services using Docker"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService, DashboardService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ValidationService, MQTTBrokerService
]

instance TimescaleDBStorage : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series storage for crane state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService
]

instance GrafanaVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization of data using Grafana"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardService
]

instance MosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol communication for data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]

instance GantrylibPythonModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for gantry crane control and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance ArduinoIDE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Development environment for Arduino microcontroller code"
]

instance KiCadHardwareDesign : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Hardware design for custom PCBs"
]

instance CapellaMBSE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering using Capella"
]

instance DatabaseService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database for time-series storage"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLogInsight
]

instance DashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana-based dashboard for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation model for trajectory validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

instance ValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing simulation vs. real measurements"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationAlert
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionService
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection via time series classification techniques"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultLocalizationInsight
]

instance FaultLocalizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault localization using time series classification techniques"
]

instance ContinuousValidationAlert : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers alerts when threshold breaches are detected in validation process"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides insights for operator decision-making on trajectory optimization"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane state data"
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of simulation results against real measurements"
]

instance DataLogInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confirmation of data logging to TimescaleDB"
]

instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Transmits real-time data via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion 360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CapellaMBSE
]

instance KinematicTrajectoryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerContainerization, GantrylibPythonModule
]

instance SimulationTrajectoryValidationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for trajectory validation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerContainerization, GantrylibPythonModule
]

instance DarTwinNotation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "System evolution model using DarTwin notation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CapellaMBSE
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service executed via the Control Application using the Physical Crane Interface to drive motors and electromagnet."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous synchronization with real-time data logging and validation; trajectory simulation and execution occur in near real-time for dynamic control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "C4 Model-based orchestration where physical components interface with Dockerized digital services via MQTT, forming a unified system for data flow and control."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers as-designed (CAD models), as-manufactured (BOM and hardware), and as-operated (real-time sensor data and control) phases of the crane's lifecycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service calculates distance metrics between simulated and real trajectory data; confidence bounds in Grafana indicate simulation validity thresholds."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; Physical Crane Interface connects to hardware controllers via Arduino-based serial communication."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Docker containers for database, MQTT broker, and dashboard deployed on a single personal computer; gantrylib Python module installed via pip."
]
